caption: A man with short dark hair, wearing a light-colored shirt and a patterned grey and white shawl, speaks into an ANI microphone in an outdoor setting with palm trees and other people in the background. On-screen graphics frame the central footage, featuring several smaller portrait photos of individuals and red and blue banners. The top red banner consistently reads "नीतीश को तेजस्वी की 'सीधी धमकी'". A yellow banner appears in the subsequent frames identifying the speaker as "नित्यानंद राय, केंद्रीय मंत्री". The bottom news ticker changes across the sequence, starting with "जे. पी. नड्डा: हमारा गठबंधन विकास के लिए ज़रूर" and later transitioning to "जे. पी. नड्डा: NDA सरकार में विकास को गति मिले". The News18 India logo is visible in the upper right corner. Throughout the clip, the man remains centered, speaking with a steady expression while the background figures remain mostly stationary.
